resources.string: Add your xAI API key to use voice input

1) Enable the keyboard:
Settings → System → Languages & input → On-screen keyboard → Manage keyboards → enable **Grok Voice Input**

2) Optional — default system voice input (mic in apps):
Settings → System → Languages & input → Default voice input method → Grok Voice Input

(OEM wording may differ.)
Speak now — tap the circle when done
Transcription failed — tap the circle to try again
